vision: Premium local-first Living Workspace OS for AI agent teams

principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix OS aesthetics with cinematic quietness
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the stage
Contrast: High contrast text, subtle borders, deep backgrounds

shell_structure.sidebar: w-[280px] border-r border-[#1F1F1F] h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] z-40 hidden md:flex flex-col
shell_structure.context_panel: w-[320px] border-l border-[#1F1F1F] h-screen fixed right-0 top-0 bg-[#0A0A0A] z-40 hidden lg:flex flex-col

grid_system.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

r3f_ambient.concept: Subtle particles, slow moving fog, monochrome wireframes

command_palette.style: Fixed center, glass backdrop, search focused

accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring: ring-1 ring-white/50 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#020202]

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FIRST: Install new dependencies (fonts, icons, r3f, missing shadcn components).
2. SECOND: Update `tailwind.config.ts` and `globals.css` with the new color palette and fonts.
3. THIRD: Refactor `layout.tsx` to implement the new Premium Shell (Sidebar + Main).
7. SEVENTH: Add the Ambient 3D layer (lazy loaded).
8. EIGHTH: Clean up old components and ensure 'Anti-AI' design guidelines are met.
CRITICAL: Do NOT delete existing backend logic unless necessary. Refactor frontend heavily.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
